    • services/api/friendshipService
    • FriendshipService

    Variable FriendshipServiceConst

    FriendshipService: {
        acceptFriendRequest(friendshipID: string): Promise<void>;
        getFriendsOfUser(): Promise<UserPreviewDTO[]>;
        getIncomingFriendRequests(): Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>;
        getOutgoingFriendRequests(): Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>;
        rejectFriendRequest(friendshipID: string): Promise<void>;
        removeFriend(friendID: string): Promise<void>;
        sendFriendRequest(addresseeID: string): Promise<void>;
    } = ...

    Client for the friendship endpoints (send/accept/reject requests, remove friends, and list friends and pending requests). Live updates are delivered separately over the chat hub (see usePresence). Methods throw with the server's message on failure.

    Type Declaration

    • acceptFriendRequest: function
      • acceptFriendRequest(friendshipID: string): Promise<void>

        Accepts a pending friend request addressed to the current user.

        Parameters

        • friendshipID: string

          The pending friendship to accept.

        Returns Promise<void>

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:51
    • getFriendsOfUser: function
      • getFriendsOfUser(): Promise<UserPreviewDTO[]>

        Returns the current user's accepted friends, each with live presence status.

        Returns Promise<UserPreviewDTO[]>

        The list of friends.

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:116
    • getIncomingFriendRequests: function
      • getIncomingFriendRequests(): Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>

        Returns the pending friend requests addressed to the current user.

        Returns Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>

        The list of incoming requests.

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:133
    • getOutgoingFriendRequests: function
      • getOutgoingFriendRequests(): Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>

        Returns the pending friend requests sent by the current user.

        Returns Promise<FriendshipDTO[]>

        The list of outgoing requests.

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:150
    • rejectFriendRequest: function
      • rejectFriendRequest(friendshipID: string): Promise<void>

        Rejects a pending friend request addressed to the current user.

        Parameters

        • friendshipID: string

          The pending friendship to reject.

        Returns Promise<void>

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:69
    • removeFriend: function
      • removeFriend(friendID: string): Promise<void>

        Removes an existing friend.

        Parameters

        • friendID: string

          The friend to remove.

        Returns Promise<void>

        • Defined in services/api/friendshipService.ts:92
    • sendFriendRequest: function
      • sendFriendRequest(addresseeID: string): Promise<void>

        Sends a friend request to another user.

        Parameters

        • addresseeID: string

          The user to send the request to.

        Returns Promise<void>
